title: Policy Brief Cluster “S”: Social and Demographic Aspects
description: A policy brief synthesizing the social and demographic aspects of mountain value chains analyzed by the EU Horizon 2020 MOVING project, focusing on cooperation, inclusiveness, and associated challenges across seven case-study regions. It identifies key challenges—low cooperation, moderate inclusiveness, and trade-offs between social and economic performance—and proposes policy recommendations including bottom-up approaches, innovation brokers, living labs, and fine-tuned subsidies to enhance resilience and sustainability of mountain communities.
